TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ashraf_Ghani_Ahmadzai, title = Ashraf_Ghani_Ahmadzai, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ashraf_Ghani_Ahmadzai} }

S.FORM: == Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 5, Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, biru na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Afghanistan ta' misuw hya' ga Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Rula Ghani ga, kneril ni Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Rula Ghani, tehuk misuw qani. Rula Saade Ghani htagan beh sa ngasal na Lebanese Christian. kawas tay 1970 maki Lebanon,hga sazing hi mqwas hopa pqwasan biru mqbaq lga msqun mqyanux la.msqun mqyanux beh Amelika hga sazing hi. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai ru Rula Ghani maki sazing laqi.qutux kneril laqi qutux mlikuy laqi,Mariam ru Tariq lalu nya. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai htagan beh sa Afghanistan. hiya ga Ahmadzai Pashtun qalang nya. Ashraf tmasot kawas tay 1967,mqwas biru beh Lake Oswego High School in Lake Oswego, Oregon. kawas tay 1973,tmasot mqwas biru beh Amelika hopa pqwasan biru.suruw lga,kawas tay 1977 tmasot mqwas biru beh Columbia hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 5, Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, biru na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Afghanistan ta' misuw hya' ga Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Rula Ghani ga, kneril ni Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai maki tay kawas 1975 msqun ki Rula Ghani, tehuk misuw qani. Rula Saade Ghani htagan beh sa ngasal na Lebanese Christian. kawas tay 1970 maki Lebanon,hga sazing hi mqwas hopa pqwasan biru mqbaq lga msqun mqyanux la.msqun mqyanux beh Amelika hga sazing hi. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai ru Rula Ghani maki sazing laqi.qutux kneril laqi qutux mlikuy laqi,Mariam ru Tariq lalu nya. Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai htagan beh sa Afghanistan. hiya ga Ahmadzai Pashtun qalang nya. Ashraf tmasot kawas tay 1967,mqwas biru beh Lake Oswego High School in Lake Oswego, Oregon. kawas tay 1973,tmasot mqwas biru beh Amelika hopa pqwasan biru.suruw lga,kawas tay 1977 tmasot mqwas biru beh Columbia hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == as~Й•Д§ra* ЙЈД§ani aД§ma*zai == rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj *, as~Й•Д§ra* ЙЈД§ani aД§ma*zai, ОІiru na s~Й•eziК”. (minД§tuw s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) mrД§uw a*ЙЈД§anis~Й•tan taК” mis~Й•uw Д§jaК” ЙЈa as~Й•Д§ra* ЙЈД§ani aД§ma*zai, ariЕӢ rjax taj ** s~Й•qu ОІjaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ taj * s~Й•a kawas~Й• **** lЙЈa, mus~Й•aК” s~Й•pazjaЕӢ ОІalaj ms~Й•К”rux kja la. qnxan nja rula ЙЈД§ani ЙЈa, kneril ni as~Й•Д§ra* ЙЈД§ani aД§ma*zai. as~Й•Д§ra* ЙЈД§ani aД§ma*zai maki taj kawas~Й• **** ms~Й•qun ki rula ЙЈД§ani, teД§uk mis~Й•uw qani. rula s~Й•aa*e ЙЈД§ani Д§taЙЈan ОІeД§ s~Й•a ЕӢas~Й•al na leОІanes~Й•e КҰ~КЁД§ris~Й•tian. kawas~Й• taj **** maki leОІanon,Д§ЙЈa s~Й•aziЕӢ Д§i mqwas~Й• Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru mqОІaq lЙЈa ms~Й•qun mqjanux la.ms~Й•qun mqjanux ОІeД§ amelika Д§ЙЈa s~Й•aziЕӢ Д§i. as~Й•Д§ra* ЙЈД§ani aД§ma*zai ru rula ЙЈД§ani maki s~Й•aziЕӢ laqi.qutux kneril laqi qutux mlikuj laqi,mariam ru tariq lalu nja. as~Й•Д§ra* ЙЈД§ani aД§ma*zai Д§taЙЈan ОІeД§ s~Й•a a*ЙЈД§anis~Й•tan. Д§ija ЙЈa aД§ma*zai pas~Й•Д§tun qalaЕӢ nja. as~Й•Д§ra* tmas~Й•ot kawas~Й• taj ****,mqwas~Й• ОІiru ОІeД§ lake os~Й•weЙЈo Д§iЙЈД§ s~Й•КҰ~КЁД§ool in lake os~Й•weЙЈo, oreЙЈon. kawas~Й• taj ****,tmas~Й•ot mqwas~Й• ОІiru ОІeД§ amelika Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru.s~Й•uruw lЙЈa,kawas~Й• taj **** tmas~Й•ot mqwas~Й• ОІiru ОІeД§ КҰ~КЁolumОІia Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК”
